top_signals.title: Bank of England governor denies Farage lobbying swayed CBDC policy: Report
top_signals.summary: Andrew Bailey reportedly said Bank of England policy remained independent after a meeting with Nigel Farage that included discussions on cryptocurrency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump's European allies add distance on Iran following testy NATO summit
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump spent two days in Ankara, Turkey with other NATO member leaders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Schiff: ‘Trapped’ Fed sets up $200 silver, $10,000 gold
top_signals.summary: Peter Schiff says US debt, not interest rates, will drive precious metals sharply higher as the Fed loses room to act.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: McConnell health update demanded by Gov. Beshear as Senate vacancy questions grow
top_signals.summary: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to a hospital on June 14.

top_signals.title: ANA opens Hokkaido facility to ensure continuity in event of disaster
top_signals.summary: The major airline moved part of its operations from Tokyo's Haneda Airport to the new facility, which began full-scale operations earlier this month.

top_signals.title: Telco giant KDDI says data breach affects over 12 million people
top_signals.summary: Japanese telecommunications giant KDDI says that millions of people had their email addresses and passwords exposed after attackers breached an email platform used by five internet service providers (ISPs) in the country. [...]
